WHAT_WE_OFFER

Better technologyjudgment starts here.

Practical advisory for companies that need clear technical direction, honest assessment, and decisions that support real business outcomes.

01

Technology Strategy

Align your technology roadmap with business objectives. We cut through vendor noise and give you a clear path forward.

02

Architecture Reviews

Is your system built to last? We examine your stack, identify structural weaknesses, and provide a hardening plan.

03

Vendor Rescue

Stuck with a broken build from another team? We assess the damage, stabilize what's salvageable, and rebuild what's not.

04

AI Roadmap

Not every problem needs AI. We help you identify where AI creates real value — and where it creates risk.

05

Technical Due Diligence

Investing in or acquiring a tech company? We'll tell you what the code actually looks like under the hood.

06

Team & Process Guidance

Build better engineering habits. From code reviews to CI/CD to how your team uses AI tools responsibly.

WHO_THIS_IS_FOR

You needadvisory if...

You're a founder making technology decisions without a technical co-founder

01

You've been burned by a dev shop and need to understand what went wrong

02

You're exploring AI but don't know where to start or what to trust

03

You're growing fast and your current systems are cracking under pressure

04

You're evaluating a tech acquisition and need honest due diligence

05

Your team uses AI tools but nobody's reviewed the output for production safety

06
LETS_TALK

Need a technology partner, not a vendor?

Book a strategic consultation. No pitch decks — just honest technology guidance.
